hero.subheading: Full-Stack Engineer specialized in scalable web solutions & business automation
hero.tagline: 4+ years turning complex business challenges into elegant, high-performance web applications.

about.label: About Me
about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Engineer by training, developer by passion
about.description: With a unique background combining Hydraulic Engineering and Full-Stack Development, I bring analytical rigor to every project. I don't just write code — I design systems that solve real business problems. My engineering mindset ensures scalable architecture, clean code, and measurable results.

services.label: What I Do
services.title: My Services
services.subtitle: End-to-end web solutions tailored to your business needs
services.digital_strategy_desc: Transform your vision into a coherent digital roadmap that drives growth and engagement.
services.web_design_desc: Pixel-perfect, responsive designs that captivate users and reflect your brand identity.
services.ux_desc: Intuitive interfaces grounded in user research that maximize satisfaction and conversions.
services.web_dev_desc: Robust, scalable applications built with modern frameworks and industry best practices.
services.cms_desc: Custom e-commerce and CMS solutions that are easy to manage and optimized for performance.
services.database_desc: Efficient data architectures that ensure speed, reliability, and seamless integrations.

skills.label: Expertise
skills.title: Technical Skills
skills.subtitle: A well-rounded skill set covering the full development spectrum — from pixel-perfect UIs to robust server architectures.

whyhire.label: Why Me
whyhire.title: Why Hire Me
whyhire.subtitle: What sets me apart from other developers
whyhire.reason1_desc: I don't just jump into coding — I study the problem, design the architecture, and build solutions that last. My engineering background means every decision is data-driven.
whyhire.reason2_desc: I've built production platforms handling real users and transactions — not just tutorial projects. From e-commerce to management tools, I deliver business value.
whyhire.reason3_desc: Experienced working in distributed, cross-functional teams using SCRUM. I communicate clearly, ship on time, and adapt fast to changing requirements.
